hero.headline: IT and Marketing,
hero.body: We run the full stack — from infrastructure and development to brand strategy and campaigns. One team, two disciplines, no gaps.
hero.tagline: One company. Two disciplines. Full coverage.

valueProps.title: One team, two disciplines
valueProps.description: IT and Marketing under one roof means no miscommunication, no gaps, no finger-pointing.

valueProps.title: Full in-house delivery
valueProps.description: Every service is delivered by our own people. No outsourcing, no freelancer relay.

valueProps.title: Built to last
valueProps.description: We design for longevity — systems that scale and strategies that compound.

valueProps.title: Straight talk, always
valueProps.description: Clear timelines, honest advice and real answers. We don't hide behind jargon.
